Do You Know What Happened on Your Wells Yesterday?

24/7 well monitoring that installs in 10 minutes. No wires. No SCADA. No kidding.

Built in the oil patch by pumpers, field supervisors, engineers, and operators like you. 15 years of feedback from the people who actually do the work.

  • Installs in 10 minutes. No electrician, no trenching, no third parties
  • Zero dead zones. Auto-switching cellular + satellite. 100% continental US coverage.
  • Lifetime replacement. If it breaks, we ship you a new one

Here's a free rule of thumb: if you can't check your tank level without driving to the lease or calling your pumper, you're flying blind on wells that are producing (or not) whether you're watching or not.

Hear It Straight from the Founder

Ten minutes. No fluff. Just a plain-spoken walkthrough of what TinyPumper does, why we built it, and why it works for operators like you.

You already know these moments.

Without TinyPumper
With TinyPumper
It's Friday at 5. You're wondering if your pumper checked that well on the back 40. You'll find out Monday. Maybe.
Your pumper taps "submit" and you see the gauge reading before he's back in his truck. From anywhere.
Production's been slipping for two weeks. You don't know it yet. Your JIB does.
You get an alert the hour production drops. Not two weeks later when the revenue check is light.
Compressor goes down at 2 AM. Nobody finds out until your pumper rolls up the next morning. 14 hours of lost production later.
Compressor down. Lease 14. Your team gets the alert, handles it, gets it back online. You find out over coffee.
You're at your kid's baseball game. Trying to watch the game. Thinking about your wells.
You're at your kid's baseball game. You glance at your phone. All wells running. You watch the game.
Take the 60-Second Quiz →

Look, we're not for everybody.

If you're a publicly traded supermajor with a floor of engineers in Houston and a seven-figure IT budget? We're probably not your first call. And that's fine.

And let's be honest: if you're sitting on gangbuster 1,000+ BOPD flush-production horizontals, a quarter-million-dollar SCADA system has its place. That's where those rigs earn their keep.

But here's the thing: there are over 770,000 stripper wells in the United States. Wells that SCADA forgot. Wells that "don't justify" a $30,000 install. Wells that still get monitored the same way they did twenty years ago: a truck, a clipboard, and a prayer.

If you're an independent operator, whether you're running 2 wells or 2,000...

If you're tired of driving to a lease just to read a gauge...

If your pumper's handwriting gives you nightmares and you're reconciling run tickets on a spreadsheet that hasn't been updated since Obama was in office...

We built this for you.

TinyPumper is remote monitoring for the independents. The operators who built their business with sweat, not stock options. For the wells that Wall Street doesn't talk about but America still runs on.

We Ship It Ready to Go

Your TinyPumper arrives pre-configured with your well info already loaded. Sensors activated. Cellular and satellite tested. Open the box. It's ready.

2

Mount It and Walk Away

Strap it to the tank, stick it with the magnet, or zip-tie it to a post. No wires. No electrician. No drilling holes. No permits. No third parties. Your pumper can do it between gauge runs.

"Installed it between gauge runs. Didn't even finish my coffee."

3

See Your Wells. Right Now

Open the Greasebook app on your phone. Your tank levels, pressures, injection rates, all of it, with readings throughout the day. Set alerts. Pull reports. Know what's happening without calling anyone.

What Ships to Your Door

Five pieces. No mystery parts. Every kit is pre-configured for your wells and arrives ready to mount.

TinyPumper Gateway

The brain. Solar-powered, IP67-rated, Class I Div 1 certified. Connects up to 8 sensors via BLE 5.0 and pushes data over cellular or satellite. Built-in shake counter detects whether your engine or compressor is running, and alerts you the moment it goes offline. Mounts with magnets, zip ties, or screws.

Radar Tank Sensor

Screws into any standard 2″ NPT port. Non-contact radar reads fluid level through foam and vapor. Auto-calibrates against your manual gauges over 3-4 days. Runs on double-A batteries you can grab at any drug store. Swap-out is as easy as changing the batteries in your TV remote. No wiring.

Pressure Sensor

Casing, tubing, flowline, injection, disposal. Monitors any pressure point up to 10,000 PSI. Accurate to 0.5%. Threads onto standard fittings. Two AA batteries, swap in seconds.

Flow / Turbine Sensor

Inline turbine meter for injection, disposal, and water transfer lines. Real-time rate and cumulative volume. Connects to the gateway wirelessly. No signal cable, no conduit.

Greasebook App

Every TinyPumper includes a free Greasebook subscription. Tank levels, pressures, flow rates, alerts, reports, and field data, all on your phone, tablet, or desktop. This is where the data lives.

Money-back guarantee

Every TinyPumper sensor ships with a lifetime replacement guarantee. If it breaks, we send you a new one. No questions, no fine print, no expiration. That's unheard of in the oil patch. We know, because we looked.

While you're reading this, thousands of wells just like yours are already reporting. Their operators aren't driving to the lease to check gauges. They're not wondering what happened overnight. They already know.

Every day without eyes on your wells is a day you're losing production you don't know about

Your pumper's numbers and the sensor's numbers, in one place. Finally.

Here's the problem nobody talks about: your pumper gauges the tank and writes down a stock total of 127 barrels. The sensor reads stock at 131. Your Excel spreadsheet says something else entirely. And your partner calls asking why the numbers don't match.

TinyPumper feeds directly into Greasebook, the fastest-growing production reporting platform in the oil patch. One app. One dashboard. One version of the truth.

  • Your pumper's field data
  • Your sensor's real-time readings
  • Your decline curves and production history
  • Your run tickets and allocation
  • Your state and federal reports, investor reports, and bank reports

All in your pocket. All matching.

No more "my spreadsheet says..." conversations.

Already got a production software you're happy with? TinyPumper plays nice with all systems. We'll be glad to open up our API and send the data there, too.

Take the 60-Second Quiz →

Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

24/7 Tank Monitoring

See your tank levels right now. Not tomorrow, not next week, right now. From your phone, your laptop, or your truck. Set high/low alerts so you're never surprised by a short run ticket again.

Injection & Disposal Tracking

Know exactly how much water you're moving and where it's going. Stop guessing. Stop overpaying. Stop wondering if the disposal company's numbers match yours.

Pressure Monitoring

Casing, tubing, line pressure. Tracked continuously. Catch problems before they become workovers.

The Wireless Mesh

One gateway, up to 8 sensors. Tanks, pressures, flow. All talking to one brain. One low price per facility, all-you-can-eat. Add sensors as you need them. The price doesn't go up.

Solar Powered, Battery Backed

100% self-powered. No running wire to the nearest pole. No generator. No electrician. Your pumper can set it up between runs. No third parties, no special crew. Works where nothing else will.

100% Coverage. Zero Dead Zones

Multi-carrier cellular SIM that auto-switches between networks. And when you're truly in the middle of nowhere? Satellite. 100% of the continental US. Every wellhead, every lease, everywhere.

60 Days. Love It or Shove It.

You try TinyPumper for 60 days. Install it. Beat on it. Let your pumper beat on it. Check your tanks from your kid's soccer game. Pull it up at dinner with your partner.

If after 60 days you don't think it's worth every penny? Send it back. Full refund. We'll even pay the return shipping.

No hoops. No "retention department." No hard feelings.

We can do this because we've been doing this for 15 years. We know what happens when operators actually use it: they don't send it back. They order more. In fact, demand is high enough that we regularly have a waiting list, so when units are available, they move fast.

Take the quiz now to reserve your spot and lock in your sensors before the next batch is spoken for.

The math is simple.

SCADA makes sense when you're drilling horizontals and the initial BOPD justifies the infrastructure.

But here's what nobody tells you: those horizontals decline. Fast. And that SCADA contract doesn't decline with them. Two years in, you're paying the same maintenance fees on wells producing a third of what they used to, and you start wondering if all that wiring and infrastructure is worth the upkeep.

TinyPumper makes sense from day one, and it still makes sense on year ten, when your well is doing 5 barrels a day and you need real answers without getting raked over the coals to keep a legacy system running.

Shipping and handling included. Straight to your door, your office, your supply shop, wherever you want it.

And here's the part that makes the SCADA guys scratch their heads:

We get it. Sounds too good to be true. So don't take our word for it. Here's what operators say after they plug in.

FAQ

"Is this complicated?"
No. If you can screw in a lightbulb, you can install TinyPumper. We ship it pre-configured. You mount it. Done. Most operators are up and running in under 10 minutes. No electrician, no special tools, no third parties. Your pumper handles it between runs.
"What if I don't have cell service at my lease?"
That's the whole point. Our dual-connectivity system auto-switches between multi-carrier cellular and satellite. 100% of the continental US is covered. If you've got sky above your wellhead, you've got coverage.
"How is this different from SCADA?"
SCADA was built for big operations with dedicated IT teams, infrastructure budgets, and high-volume wells that justify the spend. TinyPumper was built for independents who need the same visibility without the overhead. Think of it like this: you don't run an ESP on a 3-barrel stripper? You run a rod pump. Simple, reliable, fits the well. Same idea. You don't need SCADA on every lease. You need something that fits.
"Will my pumper actually use it?"
They won't just use it. They'll love it. Know why? Because they don't have to climb tank stairs anymore. That's the thing nobody talks about. Your best pumper is probably 55 or 60 years old. His back hurts. His knees hurt. He's been climbing icy tank stairs for 30 years. Up, down, up, down, 50 tanks a day. TinyPumper means he stays in his truck, reads the level on his phone, and focuses on what actually matters: stroking the well, dialing in production, using that 30 years of knowledge that's worth more than any sensor. You want the pumper's brain, not his body. Keep him off those stairs and you'll get another 3 to 5 years out of him, because he can actually do the work without breaking down. The Greasebook app is built for the field. Big buttons, simple screens, works on any phone. The first week, your guys might grumble. By week three, they won't want to go back.
"What if I already have SCADA on some wells?"
Keep it. TinyPumper plays nice with existing systems. Most operators use SCADA on their higher-volume producers and TinyPumper on the rest. The strippers, the marginals, the wells that "don't justify" traditional monitoring. Now they're all visible in one place. And when those SCADA maintenance contracts come up for renewal, you might find yourself wondering if you even need them anymore.
"How fast can I be up and running?"
We ship fast. Usually within a few business days (when we're not sold out). Install takes 10 minutes. You'll be looking at live data before lunch.
"What if I don't like it?"
Send it back. 60-day money-back guarantee. We pay return shipping. No retention calls, no guilt trips, no hoops. We've been doing this for 15 years. We're confident enough to let the product speak for itself.
"Who are you guys?"
We're Greasebook. Born in the oil patch, headquartered in Oklahoma City. 600+ production companies. 15 years. 220+ million barrels tracked across 22 oil-producing states in the union. We built TinyPumper because we got tired of watching operators fly blind on wells that deserved better.
"What does it cost?"
A few hundred bucks per device. That includes your sensors, shipping, and a production engineer walking you through setup on a live call. No setup fee, no training fee, no hidden charges. Monthly monitoring is one flat price per facility, all-you-can-eat. Track as many tanks, wells, and equipment as you want at that location. Take the quiz and we'll give you a straight answer for your specific setup. No bait-and-switch.
"How does the wireless mesh pricing work?"
Simple. One low price per facility, all-you-can-eat. You get one gateway with up to 8 sensors (tanks, pressures, flow, whatever you need). The price doesn't go up as you add sensors. If your facility needs more than 8 sensor points, you add a second gateway at that same facility for a fraction of the cost. Each gateway covers about 100 feet line of sight. Most leases only need one.
